article.title: Need help for interview
article.content:
Hey LeetCode community,
I was recently laid off and am currently looking for new job opportunities. I've practiced DSA thoroughly and even interviewed at Amazon. Despite that, I’m finding it really difficult to apply for jobs now — I hardly get any calls from Naukri.com and struggle to find good opportunities on LinkedIn.

My resume is strong — I’ve received interview calls from Uber, Urban Company, and Snowflake. However, I couldn’t clear any due to weak graph-related problems, and now I feel stuck.

I’m really frustrated and would be grateful for any guidance on how to find job roles and apply effectively. Any help, advice, or referrals from this amazing community would mean a lot.

Thank you so much in advance!

post.content:
I am not sure if this post is from USA or India. i was in the same boat couple months back. What i did for getting more interviews.

Context: I am masters student in the USA. I was unable to get any interview calls

1. I had  created two to three resume version each for different positions
2. I used this website applyjobsforme.com to get interview calls. (there are many such things like this in the market)
3. Focus on not repeating the same mistake 
4. Practice leetcode (solid 3 hours)

Give this a try for couple months.

1. You can get your resume reviewed
2. Practice graph problems
3. Take referrals
4. Apply again
